Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10289 0 0}Just because it's a new school year doesn't mean that students should be running wild.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's up to me to reinforce order. That is, once I've officially become a member of the disciplinary committee.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11237 0 0}You're making such a sour face again, Odagiri-kun... I guess some things never change.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11293 0 0}Aren't you excited? The spring season always feels like the beginning of something new.[n]{f 1 1}
